title: Hotel Check-in
context: You are arriving at a hotel in the evening after a long journey. Speak with the receptionist, confirm your reservation, and ask about useful services before going to your room.
user_role: A guest checking into a city hotel for a short business trip
agent_role: A hotel receptionist welcoming a guest and explaining the booking details
opening_prompt: Good evening and welcome to Riverside Hotel. May I have your name, please, so I can find your reservation?
target_grammar: Polite questions with could and would
